task_completion.visual_evidence: OrientDB Studio web interface or database CLI is visible, showing an active connection to 'demodb'.

task_completion.description: Agent queried the database to audit existing HasFriend edges.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A SELECT or MATCH query in the query editor (e.g., SELECT FROM HasFriend) and its results, or a graph visualization showing the initial one-way relationships.

task_completion.description: Agent created the missing reverse edge from Maria Garcia to John Smith.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A CREATE EDGE query executed where the FROM target is maria.garcia@example.com and the TO target is john.smith@example.com, or a graph view showing this specific new directed edge.

task_completion.description: Agent created the missing reverse edge from Sophie Martin to David Jones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A CREATE EDGE query executed where the FROM target is sophie.martin@example.com and the TO target is david.jones@example.com, or a graph view showing this specific new directed edge.

task_completion.description: Agent created the missing reverse edge from James Brown to Yuki Tanaka.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A CREATE EDGE query executed where the FROM target is james.brown@example.com and the TO target is yuki.tanaka@example.com, or a graph view showing this specific new directed edge.

task_completion.description: Agent verified that the total number of HasFriend edges is exactly 10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A query like 'SELECT count(*) FROM HasFriend' returning 10, or a graph visualization showing exactly 10 edges with all pairs being bidirectional.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OrientDB database interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OrientDB Studio web interface or a legitimate database CLI executing commands, not just a text editor with drafted SQL commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not delete any existing edges.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no 'DELETE EDGE' commands visible in the query history or command prompt.

integrity.description: Agent did not create duplicate edges.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final edge count is exactly 10, and query results or graph views do not show multiple identical edges between the same two profiles.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The database initially contains 7 'HasFriend' edges. The agent must create exactly 3 new reverse edges to achieve symmetry, resulting in exactly 10 edges. The missing edges that must be created are: 1) FROM maria.garcia@example.com TO john.smith@example.com, 2) FROM sophie.martin@example.com TO david.jones@example.com, 3) FROM james.brown@example.com TO yuki.tanaka@example.com. The agent must not delete any edges or create duplicates.
